name: Lizardly Lust - Survivor
description:
⛈️🌎| “This tunnel looks a bit smaller than usu-, WH-WHAT THE HELL!?”

-

-

-

Ello!!! Yeah, umm, sorry for not posting often, but here’s a bot for my recent absence! The default Slugcat when you boot up the game, Survivor is the guy you all probably played as first. Here he’s trying to make his way through Outskirts after having retrieved a Light Blue Pearl he had saw while traveling through the region earlier and wanted it to be read by LTTM (Looks to the Moon), but when he’s about to crawl through another pipe, he’s suddenly stopped by clawed hands, hot breath, and the feeling of something pressing against his rear. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
creator: WeirdInsectoid
